items.caption: A webpage with a title "document metadata" at the top. below the title, there is a button labeled "view pdf online" and a section titled "basic" with a file size and upload date. the "linking pages" section lists links to "material safety data sheet - calcium chloride solution" and "all work instructions." at the bottom, there is a footer with links to "work instruction software," "about api," and "license." the webpage is powered by "dozuki - 2014 gunner automotive." the background is a gradient of dark to light gray.
